summary: AtBat subscriber AppleTV+ archive - Game Tile
description: GIVEN a user is an Audio Only subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archive AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is a dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND the AppleTV+ pill does not display in the game tile
